testcase.name: A canonical create event yields rows in messages_by_room and messages_by_id

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-persist-canonical-needs-cassandra-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-canonical-create-event-yields-rows-in-messages-by-room-and-messages-by-id-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step a canonical created event for message "msg-01" by "alice" in room "r1" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s Cassandra table "messages_by_room" contains a row for message "msg-01" in room "r1"
Step within 5s Cassandra table "messages_by_id" contains a row for message "msg-01"

testcase.name: The messages_by_room row lands in the correct time bucket derived from created_at

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-bucket-partition-needs-cassandra-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-the-messages-by-room-row-lands-in-the-correct-time-bucket-derived-from-created-at-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step a canonical created event for message "msg-02" by "alice" in room "r2" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s the "messages_by_room" row for message "msg-02" has bucket equal to the expected time-window value for its created_at

testcase.name: A thread reply yields a row in thread_messages_by_room and increments the parent tcount

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-thread-persist-needs-cassandra-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-thread-reply-yields-a-row-in-thread-messages-by-room-and-increments-the-parent-tcount-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step message "parent-msg" by "alice" in room "r3" already persisted in Cassandra
Step a canonical created event for thread reply "reply-01" by "bob" to parent "parent-msg" in room "r3" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s Cassandra table "thread_messages_by_room" contains a row for message "reply-01"
Step within 5s the tcount for message "parent-msg" in "messages_by_id" is 1
Step within 5s the tcount for message "parent-msg" in "messages_by_room" is 1

testcase.name: The first thread reply creates a ThreadRoom document and ThreadSubscription for both parent author and replier

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-thread-room-mongodb-needs-mongo-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-the-first-thread-reply-creates-a-threadroom-document-and-threadsubscription-for-both-parent-author-and-replier-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step message "parent-msg-02" by "alice" in room "r4" already persisted in Cassandra
Step a canonical created event for thread reply "reply-02" by "bob" to parent "parent-msg-02" in room "r4" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s MongoDB collection "thread_rooms" contains a document with parentMessageId "parent-msg-02"
Step within 5s MongoDB collection "thread_subscriptions" contains a document for user "alice" and threadParent "parent-msg-02"
Step within 5s MongoDB collection "thread_subscriptions" contains a document for user "bob" and threadParent "parent-msg-02"

testcase.name: message-worker ignores canonical updated events and does not write duplicate rows

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-no-edit-handler-needs-canonical-filter-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-message-worker-ignores-canonical-updated-events-and-does-not-write-duplicate-rows-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step message "msg-03" by "alice" in room "r5" already persisted in Cassandra
Step a canonical updated event for message "msg-03" by "alice" in room "r5" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s the message-worker durable consumer sequence does not advance for the updated event

testcase.name: message-worker ignores canonical deleted events and does not process soft-deletes

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-no-delete-handler-needs-canonical-filter-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-message-worker-ignores-canonical-deleted-events-and-does-not-process-soft-deletes-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step within 5s the message-worker durable consumer sequence does not advance for the deleted event
Step message "msg-04" by "alice" in room "r6" already persisted in Cassandra
Step a canonical deleted event for message "msg-04" by "alice" in room "r6" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL

testcase.name: JetStream redelivery of the same canonical create event does not produce duplicate Cassandra rows

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-idempotency-needs-cassandra-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-jetstream-redelivery-of-the-same-canonical-create-event-does-not-produce-duplicate-cassandra-rows-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step the canonical created event for message "msg-05" by "alice" in room "r7" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL twice
Step within 5s exactly 1 row for message "msg-05" exists in Cassandra table "messages_by_room"
Step exactly 1 row for message "msg-05" exists in Cassandra table "messages_by_id"

testcase.name: Out-of-order delivery of distinct canonical create events does not corrupt partition layout

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-order-independence-needs-cassandra-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-out-of-order-delivery-of-distinct-canonical-create-events-does-not-corrupt-partition-layout-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step canonical created events for "msg-06" (created 48h ago) and "msg-07" (created now) are delivered out of order to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s "msg-06" exists in Cassandra in the bucket for 48 hours ago
Step "msg-07" exists in Cassandra in the bucket for the current window

testcase.name: When Cassandra is unreachable message-worker NAKs the canonical event for redelivery

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-cassandra-error-naks-needs-jetstream-primitive, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-when-cassandra-is-unreachable-message-worker-naks-the-canonical-event-for-redelivery-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step Cassandra is made unavailable
Step a canonical created event for message "msg-08" by "alice" in room "r8" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s the delivery count for message "msg-08" on the message-worker consumer is greater than 1

testcase.name: A thread reply by a user whose home site differs from the room site triggers an OUTBOX event

failure.message: Step user "alice" from site "site-a" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: msg-worker-thread-sub-outbox-needs-jetstream-primitive, step error: config: unknown site "site-a"

error.message: Step user "bob" from site "site-b" is authenticated
Step channel room "r9" is homed on site "site-a" with member "alice"
Step message "parent-msg-03" by "alice" in room "r9" already persisted in Cassandra
Step a canonical created event for thread reply "reply-03" by "bob" (home site "site-b") to parent "parent-msg-03" in room "r9" on site "site-a" is published to MESSAGES_CANONICAL
Step within 5s an OUTBOX event of type "thread_subscription_upserted" destined for site "site-b" appears on the OUTBOX stream

testsuite.name: Room member operations pipeline — room-worker async processing

testcase.name: Owner adds a new member to a channel and room-service accepts the request

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-owner-adds-a-new-member-to-a-channel-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-owner-adds-a-new-member-to-a-channel-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-alpha"
Step "alice" requests to add member "bob" to room "project-alpha"
Step the response is successful

testcase.name: Add-member event missing X-Request-ID is rejected permanently by room-worker

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-worker-add-missing-request-id, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-add-member-event-missing-x-request-id-is-rejected-permanently-by-room-worker-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-beta"
Step "alice" requests to add member "bob" to room "project-beta" without a request ID
Step within 5s "alice" receives an async job error for operation "room.member.add"

testcase.name: Adding members to a DM room is rejected by room-service

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-members-to-a-dm-room-is-rejected-by-room-service-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-members-to-a-dm-room-is-rejected-by-room-service-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step a DM room exists between "alice" and "bob"
Step "alice" requests to add "alice" to the DM room between "alice" and "bob"
Step the response is a HandlerError error

testcase.name: Non-owner cannot add members to a restricted channel

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-non-owner-cannot-add-members-to-a-restricted-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-non-owner-cannot-add-members-to-a-restricted-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step user "carol" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of restricted channel room "classified"
Step "bob" is a member of room "classified"
Step "bob" requests to add member "carol" to room "classified"
Step the response is a HandlerError error

testcase.name: Adding a member to a non-existent room is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-a-member-to-a-non-existent-room-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-a-member-to-a-non-existent-room-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" requests to add member "bob" to room "nonexistent-room-abc" that does not exist
Step the response is a HandlerError error

testcase.name: After add-member succeeds a subscription document is written for the new member

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-worker-add-member-persistence, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-after-add-member-succeeds-a-subscription-document-is-written-for-the-new-member-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-gamma"
Step "alice" requests to add member "bob" to room "project-gamma"
Step the response is successful
Step within 5s a subscription exists in MongoDB for "bob" in room "project-gamma"

testcase.name: Adding a cross-site member produces an outbox event on the room-worker pipeline

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-worker-add-member-outbox, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-a-cross-site-member-produces-an-outbox-event-on-the-room-worker-pipeline-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "dave" is authenticated in site "site-remote"
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "cross-site-room"
Step "alice" requests to add member "dave" to room "cross-site-room"
Step the response is successful
Step within 5s an outbox event of type "member_added" is published to site "site-remote"

testcase.name: A member self-leaves a channel and room-service accepts the request

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-member-self-leaves-a-channel-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-member-self-leaves-a-channel-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-delta"
Step "bob" is a member of room "project-delta"
Step "bob" requests to leave room "project-delta"
Step the response is successful

testcase.name: Non-owner cannot remove another member from a channel

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-non-owner-cannot-remove-another-member-from-a-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-non-owner-cannot-remove-another-member-from-a-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step user "carol" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-epsilon"
Step "bob" is a member of room "project-epsilon"
Step "carol" is a member of room "project-epsilon"
Step "bob" requests to remove member "carol" from room "project-epsilon"
Step the response is a HandlerError error

testcase.name: The last owner cannot be removed from a channel

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-the-last-owner-cannot-be-removed-from-a-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-the-last-owner-cannot-be-removed-from-a-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-zeta"
Step "bob" is a member of room "project-zeta"
Step "bob" requests to remove member "alice" from room "project-zeta"
Step the response is a HandlerError error

testcase.name: After a successful self-leave the subscription document is deleted

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-worker-remove-member-persistence, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-after-a-successful-self-leave-the-subscription-document-is-deleted-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-eta"
Step "bob" is a member of room "project-eta"
Step "bob" requests to leave room "project-eta"
Step the response is successful
Step within 5s no subscription exists in MongoDB for "bob" in room "project-eta"

testcase.name: Owner promotes a member to owner and room-service accepts the request

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-owner-promotes-a-member-to-owner-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-owner-promotes-a-member-to-owner-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-theta"
Step "bob" is a member of room "project-theta"
Step "alice" requests role "owner" for member "bob" in room "project-theta"
Step the response is successful

testcase.name: Owner demotes a co-owner to member and room-service accepts the request

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-owner-demotes-a-co-owner-to-member-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-owner-demotes-a-co-owner-to-member-and-room-service-accepts-the-request-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-iota"
Step "bob" is an owner of room "project-iota"
Step "alice" requests role "member" for member "bob" in room "project-iota"
Step the response is successful

testcase.name: Non-owner cannot update another member's role

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-non-owner-cannot-update-another-member-s-role-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-non-owner-cannot-update-another-member-s-role-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

Step user "carol" is authenticated

Step "bob" is a member of room "project-kappa"
Step "carol" is a member of room "project-kappa"
Step "bob" requests role "owner" for member "carol" in room "project-kappa"
Step the response is a HandlerError error

testcase.name: The last owner cannot self-demote

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-the-last-owner-cannot-self-demote-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-the-last-owner-cannot-self-demote-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-lambda"
Step "bob" is a member of room "project-lambda"
Step "alice" requests role "member" for member "alice" in room "project-lambda"
Step the response is a HandlerError error

testcase.name: After a successful role promotion the subscription carries the owner role

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-worker-role-update-persistence, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-after-a-successful-role-promotion-the-subscription-carries-the-owner-role-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-mu"
Step "bob" is a member of room "project-mu"
Step "alice" requests role "owner" for member "bob" in room "project-mu"
Step the response is successful
Step within 5s "bob"'s subscription in room "project-mu" contains role "owner"

testcase.name: A role update for a cross-site member produces an outbox event

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-worker-role-update-outbox, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-role-update-for-a-cross-site-member-produces-an-outbox-event-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "dave" is authenticated in site "site-remote"
Step "alice" is the owner of channel room "project-nu"
Step "dave" is a member of room "project-nu"
Step "alice" requests role "owner" for member "dave" in room "project-nu"
Step the response is successful
Step within 5s an outbox event of type "role_updated" is published to site "site-remote"

testcase.name: Authenticated user creates a channel room

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-authenticated-user-creates-a-channel-room-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-authenticated-user-creates-a-channel-room-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

Step the response is successful

failure.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-authenticated-user-creating-a-channel-room-draft-demo-bob": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-authenticated-user-creating-a-channel-room-draft-demo-bob": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

Step the response is successful

testsuite.name: Room service — member operations and supporting RPCs

testcase.name: Creating a DM with yourself is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-creating-a-dm-with-yourself-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-creating-a-dm-with-yourself-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step "alice" requests to create a DM with user "alice"
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Create room with no X-Request-ID header is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-create-missing-request-id, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-create-room-with-no-x-request-id-header-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step "alice" requests to create a channel room without a request ID header
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Creating a channel with a name longer than 100 runes is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-creating-a-channel-with-a-name-longer-than-100-runes-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-creating-a-channel-with-a-name-longer-than-100-runes-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step "alice" requests to create a channel room with a name of 101 runes
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Creating a room with no users, orgs, channels, or name is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-creating-a-room-with-no-users-orgs-channels-or-name-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-creating-a-room-with-no-users-orgs-channels-or-name-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step "alice" requests to create an empty room
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Adding a bot account to a channel create request is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-a-bot-account-to-a-channel-create-request-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-a-bot-account-to-a-channel-create-request-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step "alice" requests to create a channel room "bots-test" with bot user "myapp.bot"
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Creating a DM that already exists returns the existing room ID

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-create-dm-already-exists, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-creating-a-dm-that-already-exists-returns-the-existing-room-id-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" requests to create a DM with user "bob"
Step "alice" requests to create a DM with user "bob"
Step the response contains a "dm already exists" error with an existing room ID

testcase.name: Room member adds another user to an unrestricted channel

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-room-member-adds-another-user-to-an-unrestricted-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-room-member-adds-another-user-to-an-unrestricted-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" has created channel room "add-member-happy"
Step "alice" requests to add member "bob" to room "add-member-happy"
Step the response is successful

testcase.name: A non-owner member cannot add to a restricted channel

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-non-owner-member-cannot-add-to-a-restricted-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-non-owner-member-cannot-add-to-a-restricted-channel-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step user "carol" is authenticated
Step "alice" has created channel room "restricted-add-test"
Step "alice" has added "bob" to room "restricted-add-test"
Step room "restricted-add-test" is marked as restricted
Step "bob" requests to add member "carol" to room "restricted-add-test"
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Adding a member to a DM room is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: undocumented behavior: room-add-member-to-dm, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-adding-a-member-to-a-dm-room-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" has created a DM room with "bob"
Step "alice" requests to add member "alice" to the DM room with "bob"
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: Explicitly adding a bot account to a channel via add-member is rejected

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-explicitly-adding-a-bot-account-to-a-channel-via-add-member-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-explicitly-adding-a-bot-account-to-a-channel-via-add-member-is-rejected-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step "alice" has created channel room "no-bots-channel"
Step "alice" requests to add member "myapp.bot" to room "no-bots-channel"
Step the response is a Validation error

testcase.name: A member can remove themselves from a channel (self-leave)

failure.message: Step user "alice" is authenticated: after scenario hook failed: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-member-can-remove-themselves-from-a-channel-self-leave-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host, step error: auth: POST /auth for "it-7d08-a-member-can-remove-themselves-from-a-channel-self-leave-alice": Post "http://example.invalid/auth": dial tcp: lookup example.invalid on 8.8.8.8:53: no such host

error.message: Step user "bob" is authenticated
Step "alice" has created channel room "self-leave-room"
Step "alice" has added "bob" to room "self-leave-room"
Step "bob" requests to remove member "bob" from room "self-leave-room"
Step the response is successful

testcase.name: An org-only member cannot leave individually
